requirements.R2: leads_to(tree, 'perform production action', 'perform quality check') and precedence(tree, 'deliver', 'perform quality check')
requirements.R3: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') or precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record rejection')
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'ship product') and leads_to(tree, 'fill order', send_exist(tree, 'invoice'))

requirements.R2: leads_to(tree,"perform production action","perform quality check") and precedence(tree,"deliver product","perform quality check")
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree,"fill order","ship product") and leads_to(tree,"fill order",send_exist(tree,"invoice"))

requirements.R2: leads_to(tree, 'produce product', 'check quality') and precedence(tree, 'deliver product', 'check quality')
requirements.R3: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') or precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record rejection')
requirements.R5: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'ship product') and leads_to(tree, 'fill order', send_exist(tree, 'invoice'))

requirements.R2: leads_to('perform production action', 'perform quality check') and precedence('deliver product', 'perform quality check')
requirements.R3: precedence('close order', 'record payment') or precedence('close order', 'record order rejection')
requirements.R5: leads_to('fill order', 'ship product') and leads_to('fill order', send_exist('invoice'))
